commit_scope: Add a channel observation-attribution receipt that categorizes observation value, self-observes circulation, and collapses a dimension vector into observer yield.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/grammars/gematria.fk form-stdlib/channel.fk form-stdlib/gematria-channel.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-breath-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-symbol-lens-value-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-root-ontology-lens-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-core-ontology-multi-lens-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-observation-attribution-collapse-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh --binary form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/grammars/gematria.fk form-stdlib/channel.fk form-stdlib/gematria-channel.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-breath-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-symbol-lens-value-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-root-ontology-lens-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-core-ontology-multi-lens-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-observation-attribution-collapse-band.fk
local_validation.summary: Registered CHANNEL-OBSERVATION-ATTRIBUTION as a shared channel Blueprint and added channel-observation-attribution-collapse-band.fk. The proof sends an open-entry observation offer and sensing receipt, categorizes the observation as circulation-value, records the channel count before attribution, collapses calm+clarity+trust+vitality into observer-yield, and attributes that yield to the observer without assigning ownership of the observed payload. Source and binary sibling kernels return 111111; the combined channel proof suite remains aligned.

phase_gate.reason: Local observation-attribution collapse proof is complete; CI remains pending until the PR branch is pushed.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The channel can now represent observation as value: an observer can categorize a sensed circulation event, self-observe the channel's own circulation count, collapse a multi-axis dimension vector into one attribution result, and receive attribution for observation yield.
test_flows: Send an open-entry observation offer through CHANNEL-MSG.
Send a valid symbol-lens sensing receipt for the offer.
Parse a JSON category report for circulation-value and observer-attributed mode.
Append CHANNEL-OBSERVATION-ATTRIBUTION and verify the channel count moved from 2 to 3.
Verify observer attribution does not claim ownership of the observed payload.
